title: Derrick Operators, Oil and Gas
description: Rig derrick equipment and operate pumps to circulate mud or fluid through drill hole.

tasks.text: Inspect derricks, or order their inspection, prior to being raised or lowered.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect derricks for flaws, and clean and oil derricks to maintain proper working conditions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Control the viscosity and weight of the drilling fluid.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair pumps, mud tanks, and related equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set and bolt crown blocks to posts at tops of derricks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Listen to mud pumps and check regularly for vibration and other problems to ensure that rig pumps and drilling mud systems are working properly.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start pumps that circulate mud through drill pipes and boreholes to cool drill bits and flush out drill cuttings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position and align derrick elements, using harnesses and platform climbing devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise crew members, and provide assistance in training them.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Guide lengths of pipe into and out of elevators.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare mud reports, and instruct crews about the handling of any chemical additives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clamp holding fixtures on ends of hoisting cables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weigh clay, and mix with water and chemicals to make drilling mud, using portable mixers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: String cables through pulleys and blocks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Steady pipes during connection to or disconnection from drill or casing strings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
